canonical_data_payload_preview.name: Maison Provence Restaurant
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: A cozy French bistro with a lush, plant-filled interior in the heart of Williams
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: Maison Provence presents a charming French bistro aesthetic with its plant-filled interior, blue-and-white striped awning, and warm lighting. The eclectic shelves and cozy distressed wooden chairs create an intimate, refined atmosphere in the heart of Williamsburg.

editorial.description_short: Maison Provence offers a charming Provençal-inspired bar experience in Williamsburg, featuring a lush, plant-filled interior with warm lighting and eclectic decor. The venue holds a perfect 5-star rating across 755 reviews, serving as a cozy daytime and evening retreat.

Weekend brunches in a lush, cozy setting
Evening cocktails in an intimate bistro atmosphere

canonical_data_payload_preview.name: With Others
canonical_data_payload_preview.tagline: A warm corner bar in Williamsburg for lingering over drinks
canonical_data_payload_preview.description: The interior features a curved white bar counter as the focal point, flanked by warm wall sconces and ambient candles that create soft lighting throughout. Acoustic ceiling panels and a ceiling fan add to the comfortable, lived-in feel, while patrons seated at the bar and in booths suggest a lively but not overwhelming social energy.

editorial.description_short: With Others is a cozy bar in the heart of Williamsburg where the curved white bar counter and warm wall sconces set a welcoming tone. The space balances intimate seating with a social atmosphere, drawing locals for evening drinks and conversation.
